description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, rectangular touchscreen dominating the front face, surrounded by a slim bezel. The front display shows a grid of colorful app icons, a status bar at the top, and a single circular home button at the bottom center. The back is matte black with a single camera lens and flash located in the top left corner, and no visible branding. The sides are thin and metallic, featuring small, flush buttons for volume and power control. The device is slim and lightweight, with a smooth, hard surface and rounded corners for comfortable handling. The overall design is minimalist and functional, typical of contemporary mobile phones.
description: A slim, modern smartphone with a large touchscreen, matte black back, and minimal physical buttons. The front display features colorful app icons and a single home button.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen with app icons, status bar, and a circular home button at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the thin profile and flush side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a matte black surface with a single camera and flash in the top left corner, and no visible branding.
description_view_3: Right edge view highlighting the slimness and additional side buttons.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a typical smartphone home screen with a grid of colorful app icons, a status bar at the top showing time and signal, and a beach-themed wallpaper at the bottom.
attribute_camera_placement: Single camera lens and flash located at the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on both the left and right edges, likely for volume and power control; a single circular home button is centered below the screen.
